overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character walking through an ancient Egyptian city at dusk. The character traverses cobblestone streets lined with stone buildings and lit braziers, passing a central obelisk monument and approaching a large fortified city gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient city street approaching central monument

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the cobblestone street toward the tall obelisk monument ahead

entered.detail: tall white stone monument with obelisk top and decorative base visible in the distance
row of stone buildings with columns and red awnings lining the right side of the street
tall stone wall running along the left side of the street
burning fire pits providing warm orange light against the blue dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a cobblestone street at dusk, with the white obelisk monument visible ahead. Roman-style buildings with lit interiors line the right side, while a stone wall runs along the left. The blue hour lighting creates a cool atmosphere with warm torchlight contrasting against the stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with mediterranean trees after the monument

events.description: passes the central obelisk monument and enters a more open plaza area with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: navigating around the left side of the monument base and continuing through the tree-lined plaza

entered.detail: tall thin pine trees visible in the open plaza area to the left
large fortified stone archway gate becoming visible at the end of the street
high stone defensive walls extending from the gate structure

segments.scene_description: Having passed the monument, the character enters a more open plaza with Mediterranean pine trees on the left. The fortified city gate becomes prominent in the distance, framed by defensive walls. The Roman buildings continue on the right but now appear further away as the street widens.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching the fortified city gate with defensive towers

events.description: briefly adjusts path to avoid a pedestrian walking past from the left

agents.ego_description: walking directly toward the large stone archway gate, maintaining a steady pace through the final approach

notable_agents.action: woman in traditional dress walking past the camera from left to right in the foreground

entered.detail: massive stone defensive towers flanking both sides of the city gate entrance
low stone structure with decorative elements at the base of the left tower

segments.scene_description: In the final approach to the city gate, the defensive towers loom large on both sides. A woman walks past the camera from the left, and the stone architecture of the gate becomes highly detailed. The street remains cobblestone with scattered vegetation as the character nears the archway entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cool, twilight city street that gradually opens into a wide plaza leading toward a massive fortified gate. It begins with the character walking down a cobblestone path flanked by a stone wall and Roman-style buildings with warm, lit interiors, while a white obelisk monument stands prominently ahead. As the character passes the monument, the street widens into an open plaza where Mediterranean pine trees appear on the left and the distant city gate becomes the central focus. The scene then shifts toward a final approach as the defensive towers loom large on both sides and a woman crosses the camera's path. Finally, the camera closes in on the highly detailed stone architecture of the gate's archway entrance, surrounded by scattered vegetation and cobblestones.
